title: aegilops trivialis
intro: Aegilops trivialis, also known as wild goatgrass or rough goatgrass, is a type of grassy plant belonging to the wheat and barley family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aegilops trivialis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Aegilops trivialis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
